faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IISER Pune Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a Walk-in Interview, and the date for the interview is 08 July 2026. Candidates should report on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences from a recognized university or an equivalent qualification to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-I post is 35 years. Age relaxation may be considered for candidates with higher qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month, along with a 24% House Rent Allowance.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How will the selection be done for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve a Walk-in Interview. An examination using multiple-choice questions may also be conducted if deemed necessary.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs. A duly filled application form might also be required.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Walk-in Interview for IISER Pune Project Associate-I recruitment being held?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be held at Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune), located in Pune, Maharashtra, with pincode 411008.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The position of Project Associate-I is a contractual job, meaning it is offered on a fixed-term contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates with higher qualifications apply for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with qualifications and experience higher than the advertised requirements may be considered, subject to the prior approval of the competent authority.
